title: Apply Operations to Make String Empty
titleCn: 进行操作使字符串为空

testcases.input: s = "abcd" Output: "abcd" Explanation: We do the following operation: - Remove the underlined characters s = "abcd". The resulting string is s = "". The string just before the last operation is "abcd".
testcases.expectedOutput: "abcd" Explanation: We do the following operation: - Remove the underlined characters s = "abcd". The resulting string is s = "". The string just before the last operation is "abcd".
